feed.title: AO3 - Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: The Voyeur
entry.summary:
Author: Sodomitical_Tales

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 61,920Chapters: 22/39Kudos: 33

Summary: Stiles never meant to use his binoculars for anything but the force of good, but that’s probably how a lot of villains start out. The road to Hell and all that. But honestly, if the Universe didn’t want him to spy on his neighbours, it would have told Hottie McScowlface across the yard to buy a set of curtains when he first moved in.Or to work out with clothes on.Or to take his weekly conquests to another apartment for sexy times - one with curtains or without any windows at all. Thank God, it didn't.

entry.title: Save Point
entry.summary:
Author: TheThirdChild

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 67,049Chapters: 21/?Kudos: 203

Summary: Stiles is determined to give Derek the perfect anniversary gift—the kind that proves he truly sees him. That somehow resulted in time travel and a surprise encounter with the Hale Pack pre-everything. Now he has to gather insight, avoid suspicion, and absolutely not rewrite history. Derek wanted something meaningful, but this might be too meaningful. Perfect gift status: pending.

entry.title: Have You Tried Not Being An Asshole?
entry.summary:
Author: Definitively_Different_Drivel

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,986Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 45

Summary: "Hello, this is Stiles with Open Door installer support, who am I speaking with and how can I help you?" he rattled off, lightning-fast. Fast or not, it still counted as asking for their name for QA purposes. "Derek." He rattled off customer information, then gave the most non-answer ever. "Door's not working." Stiles paused, pondering. Sounds like Peter found some poor schmucks to act as employees again. He wondered how long the new batch would last. Stiles braced himself for newbitude. Derek was gonna learn some fuckin things. "What have you tried so far?"In which Stiles is an access control tech support rep, Derek is an on-site tech dealing with nightmare installs, and Peter is a condescending dick.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski

entry.title: This Silence is too Damn Loud
entry.summary:
Author: DemonTeen97

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,376Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 203

Summary: Stiles has always been the one who is overlooked, but what if a certain Sourwolf gave him a chance. Stiles was happy. Stiles loved Derek. Maybe he should have asked what Derek saw in him. Maybe he should have seen the red flags for what they were. All it took was one phone call, on what should have been the start of the most EPIC summers, thats all it took to destroy everything he thought was real. They want him to shut up. Fine. Wish granted. his words will forever be savored by people who actually love him. He will even do them a favor and disappear.

entry.title: Change On The Rise
entry.summary:
Author: evvrythingisawesome

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 132,595Chapters: 72/75Kudos: 83

Summary: (Teen Wolf/Stargate Crossover AU continuation)As summer draws to a close, the Littlefield pack continues their long road to recovery. Still reeling from his sister's death and resurrection, Derek returns to his quest for the truth of his lost Hale ancestor; Cora grapples with the consequences of everything that transpired over the summer, including her return from the dead; and Stiles finds new ways to balance the desires of his inner demons with the needs of his pack.

entry.title: Touch Touch
entry.summary:
Author: ShieldOfIron

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 256Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 41

Summary: Stiles is a touch-er. Sprawled all over Scott in his sleep, plastered against Erica and Boyd for movie nights, reaching out to fix Lydia’s lipstick or Isaac’s curls with no irritation. Except for one, glaring exception. They’ve touched: hands clenched into fists, shoves into shoulders. But they don’t get touch-y.

entry.title: No Supporting Evidence
entry.summary:
Author: WolfFeller

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 774Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 34

Summary: When Liam Dunbar casually asks why Derek Hale was once arrested, he accidentally unleashes the worst possible person to answer: Stiles Stilinski. What starts as a simple question spirals into sarcastic commentary, zero self-preservation, and a full-blown pack investigation into Derek’s alleged mugshot. With Isaac Lahey providing a running audience and Liam fully committing to the chaos, Derek quickly finds himself outnumbered, outmatched, and one bad joke away from committing another arrest-worthy offense. Unfortunately for him, Stiles has internet access and absolutely no intention of letting this go.

entry.title: yearn for sleep that won't come
entry.summary:
Author: thatsanovelidea

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 54,003Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 126

Summary: He’s been obsessed with Derek Hale ever since he moved to Beacon Hills. He used to imagine running into him at coffee shops and becoming friends and then boyfriends. No matter that Derek Hale’s reputation as "Derek Hale: sex god" had already started garnering traction by the time Stiles got to high school with him. And plus, you know, there’s the whole straight thing. But Stiles always held out some hope, because Derek wouldn’t have been the first “straight” jock on the lacrosse team to bend him over. He wouldn’t even have been the second. He would have been the third. So, there was always that little inkling of want in the back of Stiles’ mind, but it never came to fruition. Derek Hale went on to sleep with lots and lots and lots of girls and never once did he even spare a glance at Stiles or run into him at a coffee shop. And Stiles was sure, when he started at Beacon Hills University last year, that the chances were even slimmer, because this was college and there were twenty times as many students here as in high school. So, he quite confidently resigned himself to the fact that a relationship with Derek Hale would forever remain his deepest, darkest fantasy. But then six days ago, he showed up to Am Lit.

entry.title: A Flower Made Of Iron
entry.summary:
Author: XOLissy

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,788,021Chapters: 49/?Kudos: 68

Summary: Eden Parker has learned how to survive by staying soft in a world that punishes it. Adopted young, raised in the quiet fractures of Mystic Falls, and carrying truths no one else can see, Eden moves through life balancing grief, loyalty, and a dangerous kind of hope. He loves deeply. He trusts carefully. And he has no idea how many forces—human and otherwise—are already watching him. When new friendships form, old wounds reopen, and the supernatural begins to bleed into the ordinary, Eden finds himself at the center of something far larger than a high-school existence should allow. Monsters lurk in forests and shadows. Love arrives when it shouldn’t. Protection becomes complicated. And the past—buried, sealed, and forgotten—refuses to stay quiet. Some bonds are chosen. Some are fated. And some are forged in pain, blood, and devotion. Disclaimer: I do not own the Vampire Diaries, Supernatural, Teen Wolf, Smallville, or The Originals. I do not own any of the characters besides Eden Parker and Ben Monroe. All rights reserved to the writers.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Werewolfing Heights
entry.summary:
Author: ShieldOfIron

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 513Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 88

Summary: You don't know what you smell like to werewolves. Your scent... your throat... your voice," Derek said urgently. "What?" Stiles frowned, shaking his head involuntarily. "I piss them off, I know-" "No. You're... you're... bait." "Excuse me?" "It's a term, it's disgusting but it's this thing. Certain people who are just irresistible."

entry.title: Keystone Species
entry.summary:
Author: SpaceflowerGrace

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 68,450Chapters: 11/11Kudos: 177

Summary: They didn't talk much about why Stiles was back in town. His mother had been inordinately proud of that fact she went into labor and delivered Stiles alone in the woods. It was the eighties, she couldn’t exactly call her husband on her cell phone. Stiles was born healthy in the preserve. Scott got hurt. Scott is Stiles to protect. He always has been. Stiles is pissed about quite a few things. “Scott is my fifteen year old cousin! And you hurt him and then left him alone and hurt? What’s wrong with you?” He has gotten very close to Derek’s face. Stiles takes a breath and turns away. Or- what if Stiles was the responsible adult at home?

entry.title: Distortion
entry.summary:
Author: Hellbreaker42

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,503Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 34

Summary: Claudia Stilinski's last words were a riddle spoken in Latin. Her husband is destroying himself trying to solve it. Her son is leaving voicemails that end the same way every time: "I love you, Dad. I miss you, but I understand."When a move to Beacon Hills promises a fresh start, neither of them expects what's waiting — least of all Stiles, who has no idea that his mother's final words weren't madness...They were a warning.

entry.title: Daddy’s Lakehouse Rules
entry.summary:
Author: Nightowl_22

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,623Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 34

Summary: When Stiles gets invited to his girlfriend Erica’s ridiculously wealthy family lakehouse for a week of boating, beach days, and campfires, he figures it’s the perfect chance to impress her parents. He never imagines that after Erica and her mom turn in early one night, a couple of beers with her ex-Marine father Derek will end with both of them naked in the hot tub—and Stiles buried balls-deep in the man who raised his girlfriend. Or the one where Stiles discovers there’s nothing quite like that sense of freedom when there is no swimsuit, his massive cock is spent across his thigh, and he’s just finished pumping every last drop of cum deep into his girlfriend’s hairy, gaping daddy's asshole.

entry.title: Shifting Fates
entry.summary:
Author: SarcasmIsMyOnlyDefence24

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 24,187Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 148

Summary: Given the chance to rewrite the past, Stiles wants to fix everything, but he'll have to start at square one. Some bonds are gone, some mistakes can’t be ignored, and some people have to die. Stiles holds everything on his shoulders. Only he knows what happens and only he can save his friends.
